name: Healthcare Care Pathway & Revenue Cycle
nameZh: 医疗诊疗路径与收入周期

objects.name: Patient
objects.description: A person who receives or is scheduled to receive care; the canonical patient identifier is the MRN. Mastered in Epic EHR.
objects.descriptionZh: 接受或计划接受诊疗的人；以病案号（MRN）作为唯一标识，主数据存于 Epic 电子病历系统。

attributes.name: mrn
attributes.description: Medical Record Number; the canonical patient identifier.

attributes.name: date_of_birth
attributes.description: Used with name for identity matching.

sources.snippet: **Patient** | 患者 | A person who receives or is scheduled to receive care; uniquely identified by `MRN`.
`MRN` | string(10) | **PK** | Medical Record Number; the canonical patient identifier.

objects.name: Encounter
objects.description: A single contact between a Patient and the health system, the spine of both the clinical and revenue-cycle pathways; identified by EncounterID.
objects.descriptionZh: 患者与医疗系统之间的一次接触，是临床路径与收入周期的主线；以 EncounterID 标识。

attributes.name: emergency_flag
attributes.description: Drives the R-02 / R-04 EMTALA exception.

attributes.name: discharge_date
attributes.description: Anchor for R-03, R-10, R-12 deadlines.

sources.snippet: **Encounter** | 就诊 | A single contact between a Patient and the health system; identified by `EncounterID`.
`encounterClass` | enum {Inpatient, Outpatient, Emergency, Observation}
`status` | enum {Open, Discharged, CodingComplete, Billed}

objects.name: Coverage
objects.description: An active insurance benefit linking a Patient to a payer plan; its status is set by eligibility verification (271).
objects.descriptionZh: 将患者与付款方计划关联的有效保险权益；其状态由资格核验（271 应答）设定。

sources.snippet: **Coverage** | 保险覆盖 | An active insurance benefit linking a Patient to a payer plan; identified by `CoverageID`.
`status` | enum {Active, Inactive, Termed} | Set by VerifyEligibility (271).

objects.name: Order
objects.description: A clinician instruction for a Procedure, medication, or test, each referencing a catalog Procedure; identified by OrderID.
objects.descriptionZh: 医师下达的诊疗、用药或检查指令，每条引用目录中的诊疗操作；以 OrderID 标识。

attributes.name: placed_at
attributes.description: Start of the R-06 24-hour authorization SLA.

sources.snippet: **Order** | 医嘱 | A clinician instruction for a Procedure, medication, or test; identified by `OrderID`.
`status` | enum {Placed, AuthPending, Released, Cancelled}

objects.name: Procedure
objects.description: A billable clinical service coded with CPT/HCPCS; a high-cost designated Procedure may require Prior Authorization; identified by ProcedureID.
objects.descriptionZh: 以 CPT/HCPCS 编码的可计费临床服务；高费用指定操作可能需要事前授权；以 ProcedureID 标识。

sources.snippet: **Procedure** | 诊疗操作 | A billable clinical service, coded with CPT/HCPCS; identified by `ProcedureID`.
`billedAmount` | decimal(12,2) | Drives R-04 $1,500 threshold.
`requiresAuth` | boolean | Designated-procedure flag.

objects.name: Diagnosis
objects.description: A coded condition (ICD-10-CM) documented for an Encounter and linked to supporting Procedures for medical necessity; identified by DiagnosisID.
objects.descriptionZh: 针对一次就诊记录的 ICD-10-CM 编码病情，与支持性诊疗操作关联以证明医疗必要性；以 DiagnosisID 标识。

sources.snippet: **Diagnosis** | 诊断 | A coded condition (ICD-10-CM) documented for an Encounter; identified by `DiagnosisID`.
`linkedProcedureID` | bigint | FK → Procedure | Supports R-09 / R-13 linkage.

objects.name: PriorAuthorization
objects.description: A payer approval required before delivering a designated Procedure, valid for approved units within an approval window; identified by AuthID.
objects.descriptionZh: 在实施指定诊疗操作前所需的付款方批准，在批准窗口内对批准单位数有效；以 AuthID 标识。

sources.snippet: **PriorAuthorization** | 事前授权 | A payer approval required before delivering a designated Procedure; identified by `AuthID`.
`status` | enum {Requested, Approved, Denied, Pended}

objects.name: Charge
objects.description: A financial line item generated from a documented Procedure, mapped to an active Charge Description Master line; identified by ChargeID.
objects.descriptionZh: 由已记录的诊疗操作生成的财务明细行，映射到有效的收费主数据（CDM）行；以 ChargeID 标识。

attributes.name: cdm_code
attributes.description: Charge Description Master code; the CDM is an external master (not a modeled ObjectType) and the line must be active on the date of service (R-11).

sources.snippet: **Charge** | 费用项 | A financial line item generated from a documented Procedure; identified by `ChargeID`.
`cdmCode` | string | **FK → CDM** | Must be active (R-11).

objects.name: Claim
objects.description: A billing submission to a payer covering one Encounter's Charges, scrubbed and submitted as an EDI 837; identified by ClaimID.
objects.descriptionZh: 向付款方提交、覆盖一次就诊全部费用项的账单，经清洗后以 EDI 837 提交；以 ClaimID 标识。

sources.snippet: **Claim** | 理赔单 | A billing submission to a payer covering one Encounter's Charges; identified by `ClaimID`.
`status` | enum {Draft, Held, Ready, Submitted, Accepted, Rejected, Paid, Denied}

objects.name: Denial
objects.description: A payer rejection of a Claim or line carrying a CARC/RARC reason, triaged and worked toward appeal or write-off; identified by DenialID.
objects.descriptionZh: 付款方对理赔单或行项的拒付，携带 CARC/RARC 原因码，经分诊后进入申诉或核销；以 DenialID 标识。

sources.snippet: **Denial** | 拒付 | A payer rejection of a Claim or line, carrying a CARC/RARC reason; identified by `DenialID`.
`category` | enum {Clinical, Coding, Authorization, Eligibility, Technical}

relationships.name: has
relationships.description: A patient may have many encounters; every Encounter resolves to exactly one Patient.

sources.snippet: `MRN` | string(10) | **FK → Patient** | Owning patient.
Every Encounter must resolve to exactly one Patient identified by a single active MRN.

relationships.name: has
relationships.description: A patient may have one or more coverages.

sources.snippet: `MRN` | string(10) | **FK → Patient**

relationships.name: contains
relationships.description: An encounter contains one or more orders.

sources.snippet: `EncounterID` | bigint | **FK → Encounter**

relationships.name: contains
relationships.description: An encounter contains the documented procedures performed.

sources.snippet: `EncounterID` | bigint | **FK → Encounter**

relationships.name: contains
relationships.description: An encounter carries one or more coded diagnoses.

sources.snippet: `EncounterID` | bigint | **FK → Encounter**

relationships.name: references
relationships.description: Each order references a catalog procedure.

sources.snippet: `ProcedureID` | bigint | **FK → Procedure** | Catalog procedure ordered.

relationships.name: supports
relationships.description: A documented diagnosis supports the medical necessity of a billable procedure (R-09 / R-13).

sources.snippet: Every billable Procedure on an Encounter is required to link to at least one documented Diagnosis with a supporting ICD-10-CM code.

relationships.name: authorizes

label.zh: 事前授权批准诊疗操作

relationships.description: A prior authorization approves a single designated procedure.

sources.snippet: `ProcedureID` | bigint | **FK → Procedure**

relationships.name: generated_from

label.zh: 费用项生成自诊疗操作

relationships.description: One Charge is generated per billable documented Procedure.

sources.snippet: produces one `Charge` per billable Procedure with price, revenue code, and units.

relationships.name: accrues
relationships.description: An encounter accrues one or more charges.

sources.snippet: `EncounterID` | bigint | **FK → Encounter**

relationships.name: billed_as
relationships.description: An encounter's charges are billed as one or more claims.

sources.snippet: produces a draft `Claim`

relationships.name: billed_to

label.zh: 理赔单计费至保险覆盖

relationships.description: A claim is billed against the patient's coverage.

sources.snippet: `CoverageID` | bigint | **FK → Coverage**

relationships.name: includes
relationships.description: A claim aggregates the encounter's captured charges.

sources.snippet: consumes all `ChargeCaptured` + `CodingCompleted` items for the Encounter; produces a draft `Claim`

relationships.name: incurs
relationships.description: A claim or its lines may incur one or more denials.

sources.snippet: `ClaimID` | bigint | **FK → Claim**

rules.title: Encounter resolves to one MRN
rules.titleZh: 就诊解析到唯一 MRN

statement.en: Every Encounter must resolve to exactly one Patient identified by a single active MRN.
statement.zh: 每次就诊必须解析到由单一有效 MRN 标识的恰好一位患者。

rules.formal: Encounter.mrn → exactly one Patient ∧ Patient.mrn is active

sources.snippet: Every Encounter must resolve to exactly one Patient identified by a single active MRN.

rules.title: Verify active coverage before non-emergency service
rules.titleZh: 非急诊服务前核验有效保险

statement.en: A Patient's Coverage must be verified as active before any non-emergency Procedure is performed, unless the Encounter is flagged Emergency.
statement.zh: 在实施任何非急诊诊疗操作前，必须核验患者保险覆盖为有效状态；就诊被标记为急诊的除外。

sources.snippet: A Patient's Coverage must be verified as active before any non-emergency Procedure is performed, unless the Encounter is flagged Emergency.

rules.title: Claim timely-filing deadline
rules.titleZh: 理赔及时提交时限

statement.en: A Claim shall be submitted within 90 calendar days of the Encounter discharge date for commercial payers, and within 365 calendar days for Medicare, except where a payer contract sets a shorter timely-filing limit.
statement.zh: 理赔单应在就诊出院日起 90 个日历日内向商业付款方提交、365 个日历日内向 Medicare 提交；付款方合同约定更短时限的除外。

sources.snippet: A Claim shall be submitted within 90 calendar days of the Encounter discharge date for commercial payers, and within 365 calendar days for Medicare, except where a payer contract sets a shorter timely-filing limit.

rules.title: High-cost imaging requires approved authorization
rules.titleZh: 高费用影像需已批准授权

statement.en: A high-cost imaging Procedure with a billed amount of $1,500 or more must have an approved PriorAuthorization before scheduling, unless the Encounter is flagged Emergency.
statement.zh: 账单金额达 1,500 美元或以上的高费用影像诊疗操作在排程前必须取得已批准的事前授权；就诊被标记为急诊的除外。

sources.snippet: A high-cost imaging Procedure with a billed amount of $1,500 or more must have an approved PriorAuthorization before scheduling, unless the Encounter is flagged Emergency.

rules.title: Claim requires linked approved authorization
rules.titleZh: 理赔需关联已批准授权

statement.en: A Claim may not be submitted for a Procedure that required PriorAuthorization unless an approved PriorAuthorization is linked to the Encounter.
statement.zh: 对于需要事前授权的诊疗操作，除非就诊已关联已批准的事前授权，否则不得提交理赔。

sources.snippet: A Claim may not be submitted for a Procedure that required PriorAuthorization unless an approved PriorAuthorization is linked to the Encounter.

rules.title: Urgent authorization request within 24 hours
rules.titleZh: 紧急授权 24 小时内提交

statement.en: A UM Coordinator is required to submit an urgent PriorAuthorization request to the payer within 24 hours of the Order being placed.
statement.zh: 授权管理协调员须在医嘱下达后 24 小时内向付款方提交紧急事前授权请求。

trigger.description: after an urgent Order is placed

sources.snippet: A UM Coordinator is required to submit an urgent PriorAuthorization request to the payer within 24 hours of the Order being placed.

rules.title: Authorization valid on date of service
rules.titleZh: 授权在服务日有效

statement.en: A PriorAuthorization is valid only for the approved units within its approval window, and the date of service must fall on or before the PriorAuthorization expiration date.
statement.zh: 事前授权仅在其批准窗口内、对已批准单位数有效，且服务日期必须不晚于事前授权失效日期。

trigger.description: on service delivery against an authorization

sources.snippet: A PriorAuthorization is valid only for the approved units within its approval window, and the date of service must fall on or before the PriorAuthorization expiration date.

rules.title: Sepsis bundle lactate within 3 hours of triage
rules.titleZh: 脓毒症集束在分诊后 3 小时内出乳酸结果

statement.en: A sepsis bundle must record a lactate result within 3 hours of the triage timestamp.
statement.zh: 脓毒症集束治疗必须在分诊时间戳后 3 小时内记录乳酸检测结果。

trigger.description: sepsis bundle clock starts at the triage timestamp

sources.snippet: A sepsis bundle must record a lactate result within 3 hours of the triage timestamp.
Rule R-08 (sepsis bundle clock starts at the triage timestamp).

rules.title: Billable Procedure links to documented Diagnosis
rules.titleZh: 可计费操作关联已记录诊断

statement.en: Every billable Procedure on an Encounter is required to link to at least one documented Diagnosis with a supporting ICD-10-CM code.
statement.zh: 就诊上的每项可计费诊疗操作必须关联至少一个带有支持性 ICD-10-CM 编码的已记录诊断。

sources.snippet: Every billable Procedure on an Encounter is required to link to at least one documented Diagnosis with a supporting ICD-10-CM code.

rules.title: Coding complete within 4 days of discharge
rules.titleZh: 出院后 4 日内完成编码

statement.en: An Encounter must be coding-complete within 4 calendar days of its discharge date, except for Encounters held for clinical query, which may extend to 10 calendar days.
statement.zh: 就诊必须在出院日起 4 个日历日内完成编码；因临床质询暂挂的就诊可延长至 10 个日历日。

trigger.description: on discharge, into the coding work queue

sources.snippet: An Encounter must be coding-complete within 4 calendar days of its discharge date, except for Encounters held for clinical query, which may extend to 10 calendar days.

rules.title: Charge maps to active CDM line
rules.titleZh: 费用项映射到有效 CDM 行

statement.en: Every Charge must map to an active line in the Charge Description Master on the date of service.
statement.zh: 每个费用项必须在服务日映射到收费主数据（CDM）中的有效行。

sources.snippet: Every Charge must map to an active line in the Charge Description Master on the date of service.

rules.title: Late charge beyond 7 days needs supervisor approval
rules.titleZh: 逾 7 日的迟到费用需主管批准

statement.en: A late Charge may not be added to an Encounter more than 7 calendar days after the discharge date without supervisor approval.
statement.zh: 未经主管批准，迟到费用不得在出院日起 7 个日历日后追加到就诊。

sources.snippet: A late Charge may not be added to an Encounter more than 7 calendar days after the discharge date without supervisor approval.

rules.title: Medical-necessity (LCD/NCD) linkage required
rules.titleZh: 须满足医疗必要性（LCD/NCD）

statement.en: A Procedure with a Diagnosis pairing that fails the applicable medical-necessity policy (LCD/NCD) may not be billed to the payer and must be flagged for review.
statement.zh: 诊疗操作与诊断的配对若未通过适用的医疗必要性政策（LCD/NCD），不得向付款方计费，并必须标记复核。

sources.snippet: A Procedure with a Diagnosis pairing that fails the applicable medical-necessity policy (LCD/NCD) may not be billed to the payer and must be flagged for review.

rules.title: NCCI edit prohibits unbundling without modifier
rules.titleZh: NCCI 编辑禁止无修饰符拆分计费

statement.en: Two Procedures that violate an NCCI Procedure-to-Procedure edit may not be billed on the same Claim unless a valid modifier is documented.
statement.zh: 违反 NCCI 操作对操作编辑的两项诊疗操作不得在同一理赔单上计费，除非已记录有效修饰符。

sources.snippet: Two Procedures that violate an NCCI Procedure-to-Procedure edit may not be billed on the same Claim unless a valid modifier is documented.

rules.title: Claim must be scrub-clean (Ready) before submission
rules.titleZh: 提交前理赔必须清洗通过（Ready）

statement.en: A Claim must pass all scrubber edits and reach status Ready before it may be submitted to a payer.
statement.zh: 理赔单必须通过全部清洗编辑并达到 Ready 状态，方可向付款方提交。

rules.formal: Claim.status = Submitted → priorState passed all scrubberEdits ∧ Claim.status was Ready

sources.snippet: A Claim must pass all scrubber edits and reach status Ready before it may be submitted to a payer.

rules.title: No resubmission of an accepted Claim as original
rules.titleZh: 已受理理赔不得作为原始件重提

statement.en: A Claim that has already been accepted by the payer may not be resubmitted as an original; corrections shall be submitted only as a replacement Claim with frequency code 7.
statement.zh: 已被付款方受理的理赔单不得作为原始件重新提交；更正只能以频次码 7 的替换理赔单提交。

rules.formal: Claim.status = Accepted → resubmission must use frequencyCode = 7 (replacement)

trigger.description: on resubmission of an accepted claim

sources.snippet: A Claim that has already been accepted by the payer may not be resubmitted as an original; corrections shall be submitted only as a replacement Claim with frequency code 7.

rules.title: Denial routed to analyst within 2 business days
rules.titleZh: 拒付 2 个工作日内派单至分析师

statement.en: A Denial must be routed to a Denials Analyst work queue within 2 business days of the remittance posting date.
statement.zh: 拒付必须在汇款入账日起 2 个工作日内派单至拒付处理专员的工作队列。

sources.snippet: A Denial must be routed to a Denials Analyst work queue within 2 business days of the remittance posting date.

rules.title: Appeal within payer deadline (≤ 60 days)
rules.titleZh: 申诉在付款方时限内（≤ 60 日）

statement.en: An appeal for a denied Claim shall be submitted within the payer's appeal deadline, which may not exceed 60 calendar days from the Denial date unless the payer contract grants a longer window.
statement.zh: 对被拒理赔的申诉应在付款方申诉时限内提交；自拒付日起不得超过 60 个日历日，付款方合同另行授予更长窗口的除外。

rules.formal: Appeal.submittedAt - Denial.date ≤ min(payerDeadline, 60d) unless contract grants longer

sources.snippet: An appeal for a denied Claim shall be submitted within the payer's appeal deadline, which may not exceed 60 calendar days from the Denial date unless the payer contract grants a longer window.

rules.title: Write-off approval authority thresholds
rules.titleZh: 核销审批权限阈值

statement.en: A write-off of a denied balance of $5,000 or more is required to have Director-level approval, and a write-off of $25,000 or more is required to have CFO approval.
statement.zh: 拒付余额核销达 5,000 美元或以上须经总监级批准；达 25,000 美元或以上须经 CFO 批准。

trigger.description: on write-off of a denied balance

sources.snippet: A write-off of a denied balance of $5,000 or more is required to have Director-level approval, and a write-off of $25,000 or more is required to have CFO approval.

rules.title: No balance-bill for provider coding/auth error
rules.titleZh: 因院方编码/授权错误不得向患者结余计费

statement.en: A Patient may not be balance-billed for any amount denied as a provider coding or authorization error.
statement.zh: 因院方编码或授权错误而被拒付的任何金额，不得向患者收取结余账单。

trigger.description: on patient balance billing after denial

sources.snippet: A Patient may not be balance-billed for any amount denied as a provider coding or authorization error.

ruleGroups.rationale: §2 rules establishing single-MRN patient identity and active-coverage verification before non-emergency service.
§3 rules governing when an authorization is required, must be linked, its SLA, and its date-of-service validity.
§4 rules on the sepsis bundle clock, diagnosis-procedure linkage, and coding-complete timeliness.
§5 rules on CDM mapping, late-charge windows, medical necessity, and NCCI unbundling edits.
§6 rules on timely filing, scrub-clean gating, and no-resubmit-of-accepted-claims.
§7 rules on denial routing SLA, appeal deadlines, write-off approval authority, and the no-balance-bill protection.

actions.name: RegisterEncounter
actions.description: Consumes patient demographics and scheduling data and produces a new Encounter record linked to the Patient via MRN.
actions.descriptionZh: 录入患者人口学与排程数据，生成与患者（MRN）关联的新就诊记录。

outputs.name: encounter
outputs.description: New Encounter linked to the Patient.

text.en: Resolve the patient to a single active MRN in Epic EHR.
text.zh: 在 Epic EHR 中将患者解析到单一有效 MRN。

text.en: Create a new Encounter record linked to the Patient and set status Open.
text.zh: 创建与患者关联的新就诊记录，状态设为 Open。

sideEffects.description: Creates an Encounter record in Epic EHR.

agent.toolDescription: Register a patient arrival as a new Encounter resolved to a single active MRN.
promptHints: Resolve to exactly one active MRN before creating the Encounter (R-01).

sources.snippet: **RegisterEncounter** — consumes patient demographics and scheduling data; produces a new `Encounter` record linked to the `Patient` (`MRN`).

actions.name: VerifyEligibility
actions.description: Consumes the Coverage on file, sends an EDI 270 eligibility inquiry, and stamps Coverage.status from the 271 response.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取在档保险覆盖，发送 EDI 270 资格查询，并依据 271 应答更新 Coverage.status。

inputs.name: coverage
inputs.description: Coverage on file for the Encounter.

text.en: Send an EDI 270 eligibility inquiry to the payer via the Clearinghouse.
text.zh: 通过清算网关向付款方发送 EDI 270 资格查询。

text.en: Parse the 271 response and stamp Coverage.status and eligibility_checked_at.
text.zh: 解析 271 应答并更新 Coverage.status 与 eligibility_checked_at。

sideEffects.description: EDI 270/271 eligibility exchange via the Clearinghouse.
Coverage.status := Active|Inactive|Termed

agent.toolDescription: Verify active insurance coverage via an EDI 270/271 exchange and stamp the result.
promptHints: Block non-emergency service when coverage is not Active unless emergency_flag is set (R-02).

sources.snippet: **VerifyEligibility** — consumes the `Coverage` on file; sends an EDI **270** eligibility inquiry; produces an eligibility result from the **271** response and stamps `Coverage.status`.

actions.name: RecordTriage
actions.description: Consumes vitals and chief complaint and produces a triage timestamp, an acuity level, and (when criteria met) sets Encounter.emergencyFlag.
actions.descriptionZh: 录入生命体征与主诉，生成分诊时间戳与急性度等级，必要时置 Encounter.emergencyFlag。

inputs.name: vitals
inputs.description: Captured vital signs and chief complaint.

outputs.name: encounter
outputs.description: Encounter with triage_timestamp and acuity set.

text.en: Capture vitals and chief complaint and compute acuity.
text.zh: 录入生命体征与主诉并计算急性度。

text.en: Stamp Encounter.triage_timestamp (starts the sepsis clock) and set emergency_flag when criteria are met.
text.zh: 写入 Encounter.triage_timestamp（启动脓毒症计时），符合条件时置 emergency_flag。

sideEffects.description: Encounter.triage_timestamp / emergency_flag set.

vitals.description: Captured vital signs and chief complaint.

agent.toolDescription: Record a triage assessment, stamp the triage timestamp, and flag emergencies / suspected sepsis.
promptHints: The sepsis bundle clock starts at the triage timestamp (R-08).

sources.snippet: **RecordTriage** — consumes vitals and chief complaint; produces a triage timestamp, an acuity level, and (when criteria met) sets the `Encounter.emergencyFlag`.

actions.name: PlaceOrder
actions.description: Consumes the clinician's selection and produces one or more Order records, each referencing a catalog Procedure; routes designated high-cost imaging to Prior Authorization.
actions.descriptionZh: 录入医师选择，生成一条或多条引用目录诊疗操作的医嘱记录；将指定高费用影像路由至事前授权流程。

inputs.name: procedure
inputs.description: Catalog procedure selected by the clinician.

text.en: Create one or more Order records referencing the selected Procedure.
text.zh: 创建一条或多条引用所选诊疗操作的医嘱记录。

text.en: For a designated high-cost imaging Procedure, check for an approved PriorAuthorization and route to Process C if none exists.
text.zh: 对指定高费用影像操作，检查是否存在已批准的事前授权，若无则路由至流程 C。

sideEffects.description: Creates Order records in Epic EHR.

agent.toolDescription: Place clinical orders for an encounter and route designated procedures to prior authorization.
promptHints: Designated high-cost imaging (>= $1,500) requires an approved authorization before scheduling (R-04).

sources.snippet: **PlaceOrder** — consumes the clinician's selection; produces one or more `Order` records, each referencing a catalog `Procedure`. For a designated high-cost imaging Procedure, the system checks for an approved `PriorAuthorization` and routes per Process C if none exists.

actions.name: RequestAuthorization
actions.description: Consumes the ordered Procedure, the Coverage, and supporting documentation and produces a PriorAuthorization in Requested state, transmitting an EDI 278 to the payer.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取已下达的诊疗操作、保险覆盖与支持性文档，生成处于 Requested 状态的事前授权，并向付款方发送 EDI 278 请求。

text.en: Assemble the request from the Procedure, Coverage, and supporting clinical documentation.
text.zh: 依据诊疗操作、保险覆盖与支持性临床文档组装请求。

text.en: Create a PriorAuthorization in Requested state and transmit an EDI 278 via the Clearinghouse.
text.zh: 创建处于 Requested 状态的事前授权并通过清算网关发送 EDI 278。

sideEffects.description: Creates a PriorAuthorization (Requested).
EDI 278 authorization request via the Clearinghouse.

agent.toolDescription: Assemble and transmit an EDI 278 prior-authorization request for a designated procedure.
promptHints: Submit urgent requests within 24 hours of the order being placed (R-06).

sources.snippet: **RequestAuthorization** — consumes the ordered `Procedure`, the `Coverage`, and supporting clinical documentation; produces a `PriorAuthorization` record in `Requested` state and transmits an EDI **278** request to the payer via the Clearinghouse.

actions.name: PostAuthorizationResponse
actions.description: Consumes the payer's 278 response and updates the PriorAuthorization to Approved, Denied, or Pended, recording approval number, approved units, and validity window.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取付款方 278 应答，将事前授权更新为 Approved/Denied/Pended，并记录批准号、批准单位数与有效窗口。

text.en: Parse the payer 278 response.
text.zh: 解析付款方 278 应答。

text.en: Update PriorAuthorization status and record approval number, approved units, and expiration date.
text.zh: 更新事前授权状态并记录批准号、批准单位数与失效日期。

sideEffects.description: PriorAuthorization.status := Approved|Denied|Pended

agent.toolDescription: Post the payer's 278 authorization response and update the PriorAuthorization.
promptHints: Record the expiration date; the date of service must fall on or before it (R-07).

sources.snippet: **PostAuthorizationResponse** — consumes the payer's **278** response; updates the `PriorAuthorization` to `Approved`, `Denied`, or `Pended`, and records the approval number, approved units, and validity window.

actions.name: DocumentProcedure
actions.description: Consumes the completed clinical work and produces a documented Procedure with start/stop times, links it to at least one supporting Diagnosis, and signs the clinical note.
actions.descriptionZh: 录入已完成的临床工作，生成带起止时间的已记录诊疗操作，关联至少一个支持性诊断并签署病历。

text.en: Record start/stop times for the completed Procedure.
text.zh: 记录已完成诊疗操作的起止时间。

text.en: Link the Procedure to at least one supporting Diagnosis and sign the clinical note.
text.zh: 将诊疗操作关联至少一个支持性诊断并签署病历。

sideEffects.description: Writes documented Procedure and signed note.

agent.toolDescription: Document a completed procedure and link it to supporting diagnoses.
promptHints: Every billable procedure must link to at least one documented diagnosis (R-09).

sources.snippet: **DocumentProcedure** — consumes the completed clinical work; produces a documented `Procedure` with start/stop times, links it to at least one supporting `Diagnosis`, and signs the clinical note.

actions.name: DischargeEncounter
actions.description: Consumes the discharge order and final documentation and produces a closed Encounter (status Discharged) with a discharge timestamp; this opens Process B.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取出院医嘱与最终文档，生成已关闭的就诊（status = Discharged）及出院时间戳；此举开启流程 B。

text.en: Verify the discharge order is signed and final documentation is present.
text.zh: 确认出院医嘱已签署且最终文档齐备。

text.en: Set Encounter.status = Discharged and stamp the discharge date.
text.zh: 将 Encounter.status 置为 Discharged 并写入出院日期。

sideEffects.description: Encounter.status := Discharged

agent.toolDescription: Close an encounter on discharge and stamp the discharge date.
promptHints: Coding must be complete within 4 calendar days of discharge (R-10).

sources.snippet: **DischargeEncounter** — consumes the discharge order and final documentation; produces a closed `Encounter` (`status = Discharged`) and a discharge timestamp.

actions.name: GenerateCharge
actions.description: Consumes each ProcedureDocumented event, looks up the matching CDM line, and produces one Charge per billable Procedure with price, revenue code, and units.
actions.descriptionZh: 消费每个 ProcedureDocumented 事件，查找匹配的 CDM 行，为每项可计费诊疗操作生成带价格、收入代码与单位数的费用项。

outputs.name: charge
outputs.description: Generated charge mapped to an active CDM line.

text.en: Look up the matching active CDM line for the documented Procedure.
text.zh: 为已记录诊疗操作查找匹配的有效 CDM 行。

text.en: Create one Charge with price, revenue code, and units.
text.zh: 创建一个带价格、收入代码与单位数的费用项。

sideEffects.description: Creates a Charge in RCS.

actor.roleZh: 收入周期系统费用路由

agent.toolDescription: Generate a charge from a documented procedure by matching an active CDM line.
promptHints: Every charge must map to an active CDM line on the date of service (R-11).

sources.snippet: **GenerateCharge** — consumes each `ProcedureDocumented` event; looks up the matching CDM line; produces one `Charge` per billable Procedure with price, revenue code, and units.

actions.name: AssignCodes
actions.description: Consumes the clinical documentation and produces final ICD-10-CM and CPT/HCPCS codes, running the NCCI edit set and medical-necessity (LCD/NCD) checks against the Diagnosis–Procedure pairing.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取临床文档，产出最终 ICD-10-CM 与 CPT/HCPCS 编码，并对诊断—操作配对运行 NCCI 编辑集与医疗必要性（LCD/NCD）检查。

text.en: Assign final ICD-10-CM and CPT/HCPCS codes.
text.zh: 分配最终 ICD-10-CM 与 CPT/HCPCS 编码。

text.en: Run NCCI edits and LCD/NCD medical-necessity checks on each Diagnosis–Procedure pairing.
text.zh: 对每个诊断—操作配对运行 NCCI 编辑与 LCD/NCD 医疗必要性检查。

text.en: Flag NCCI unbundling violations lacking a valid modifier.
text.zh: 标记缺少有效修饰符的 NCCI 拆分计费违规。

sideEffects.description: Encounter.status := CodingComplete

agent.toolDescription: Assign final diagnosis/procedure codes and run NCCI and medical-necessity edits.
promptHints: Do not bill pairings that fail LCD/NCD (R-13) or NCCI edits without a modifier (R-14).

sources.snippet: **AssignCodes** — consumes the clinical documentation; produces final ICD-10-CM and CPT/HCPCS codes; runs the NCCI edit set and medical-necessity (LCD/NCD) checks against the Diagnosis–Procedure pairing.

actions.name: AssembleClaim
actions.description: Consumes all captured Charges and completed coding for the Encounter, produces a draft Claim, runs the scrubber (eligibility re-check, auth presence, field completeness), and sets Claim.status Ready or Held.
actions.descriptionZh: 汇总就诊的全部已生成费用与已完成编码，生成草稿理赔单，运行清洗器（资格复核、授权存在性、字段完整性），并将 Claim.status 置为 Ready 或 Held。

outputs.name: claim
outputs.description: Draft Claim in status Ready or Held.

text.en: Aggregate the Encounter's captured Charges and completed coding into a draft Claim.
text.zh: 将就诊的已生成费用与已完成编码汇总为草稿理赔单。

text.en: Run the scrubber: eligibility re-check, authorization presence, and field completeness.
text.zh: 运行清洗器：资格复核、授权存在性与字段完整性。

text.en: Set Claim.status = Ready when scrub-clean, else Held.
text.zh: 清洗通过则将 Claim.status 置为 Ready，否则置为 Held。

sideEffects.description: Creates a draft Claim and sets its status.

agent.toolDescription: Assemble a draft claim and run the scrubber to set Ready or Held.
promptHints: A required authorization must be present on the claim (R-05); the claim must be scrub-clean before submission (R-15).

sources.snippet: **AssembleClaim** — consumes all `ChargeCaptured` + `CodingCompleted` items for the Encounter; produces a draft `Claim`; runs the claim scrubber (eligibility re-check, auth presence, field completeness) and assigns `Claim.status = Ready` or `Held`.

actions.name: SubmitClaim
actions.description: Consumes a Ready Claim and produces an EDI 837 transaction, transitioning Claim.status to Submitted.
actions.descriptionZh: 消费处于 Ready 状态的理赔单，生成 EDI 837 交易，并将 Claim.status 置为 Submitted。

text.en: Generate the EDI 837 transaction for the Ready Claim.
text.zh: 为处于 Ready 状态的理赔单生成 EDI 837 交易。

text.en: Transmit via the Clearinghouse and set Claim.status = Submitted.
text.zh: 通过清算网关发送并将 Claim.status 置为 Submitted。

sideEffects.description: EDI 837 claim submission via the Clearinghouse.
Claim.status := Submitted

actor.roleZh: 收入周期系统理赔引擎

agent.toolDescription: Submit a Ready claim as an EDI 837 transaction via the Clearinghouse.
promptHints: Submit within the timely-filing deadline (R-03); never resubmit an accepted claim as original (R-16).

sources.snippet: **SubmitClaim** — consumes a `Ready` Claim; produces an EDI **837** transaction; transitions `Claim.status = Submitted`.

actions.name: PostRemittance
actions.description: Consumes the payer's EDI 835 remittance and produces posted payments and adjustments at the Charge level; for any denied line, creates a Denial with its CARC/RARC code.
actions.descriptionZh: 消费付款方 EDI 835 汇款，在费用项层面入账付款与调整；对任何被拒行项，创建带 CARC/RARC 码的拒付记录。

text.en: Post payments and adjustments at the Charge level from the 835.
text.zh: 依据 835 在费用项层面入账付款与调整。

text.en: For any denied line, create a Denial carrying its CARC/RARC code.
text.zh: 对任何被拒行项，创建携带其 CARC/RARC 码的拒付记录。

sideEffects.description: Posts payments/adjustments at the Charge level.
Creates Denial records for rejected lines.

agent.toolDescription: Post an EDI 835 remittance and create denials for rejected lines.
promptHints: Route any created denial to a Denials Analyst within 2 business days (R-17).

sources.snippet: **PostRemittance** — consumes the payer's EDI **835** remittance; produces posted payments and adjustments at the Charge level; for any denied line, creates a `Denial` with its CARC/RARC code.

actions.name: TriageDenial
actions.description: Consumes a new Denial, classifies it (clinical, coding, authorization, eligibility, technical), and routes it to rework or write-off.
actions.descriptionZh: 消费新的拒付，按（临床、编码、授权、资格、技术）分类，并路由至返工或核销。

text.en: Classify the Denial into a category from its CARC/RARC code.
text.zh: 依据 CARC/RARC 码将拒付归入某一类别。

text.en: Route the Denial to a rework (appeal) or write-off disposition.
text.zh: 将拒付路由至返工（申诉）或核销处置。

sideEffects.description: Denial.category set and routedAt stamped.

agent.toolDescription: Classify a denial and route it to appeal or write-off.
promptHints: Route to a Denials Analyst within 2 business days (R-17); write-offs >= $5,000 / $25,000 need Director / CFO approval (R-19).

sources.snippet: **TriageDenial** — consumes a new `Denial`; classifies it (clinical, coding, authorization, eligibility, technical); routes it to rework or write-off.

actions.name: SubmitAppeal
actions.description: Consumes the corrected documentation/codes and produces a corrected Claim (frequency code 7) or a formal appeal packet, resubmitting via the Clearinghouse and re-entering the remittance loop.
actions.descriptionZh: 读取已更正的文档/编码，生成更正理赔单（频次码 7）或正式申诉包，通过清算网关重新提交并重回汇款循环。

text.en: Compile the corrected documentation/codes or a formal appeal packet.
text.zh: 汇编已更正的文档/编码或正式申诉包。

text.en: Produce a replacement Claim with frequency code 7 and resubmit via the Clearinghouse.
text.zh: 生成频次码 7 的替换理赔单并通过清算网关重新提交。

sideEffects.description: Resubmits a replacement claim / appeal packet via the Clearinghouse.
Claim.frequency_code := 7 (replacement)

agent.toolDescription: Submit a corrected/replacement claim or appeal packet for a denied claim.
promptHints: Submit within the appeal deadline (<= 60 days, R-18); use frequency code 7 (R-16); never balance-bill the patient for provider error (R-20).

sources.snippet: **SubmitAppeal** — consumes the corrected documentation/codes; produces a corrected `Claim` (frequency code 7) or a formal appeal packet; resubmits via the Clearinghouse.

events.name: patient.arrived
events.description: A patient checks in at a kiosk or a scheduled arrival signal fires, opening Process A.
events.descriptionZh: 患者在自助机签到或触发预约到达信号，开启流程 A。

sources.snippet: **Triggering event:** `PatientArrived` (kiosk check-in or scheduled-arrival signal).

events.name: encounter.created
events.description: A new Encounter has been created and broadcast to RCS and Clarity.
events.descriptionZh: 新就诊已创建并广播至收入周期系统与数据仓库。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `EncounterCreated` — broadcast to RCS and Clarity.
`EncounterCreated` | 就诊创建 | Epic EHR | RCS, Clarity | `EncounterID`, `MRN`

events.name: eligibility.verified
events.description: Eligibility has been verified; Coverage.status was stamped from the 271 response.
events.descriptionZh: 资格已核验；依据 271 应答更新了 Coverage.status。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `EligibilityVerified` (or `EligibilityFailed`).
`EligibilityVerified` | 资格已核验 | Clearinghouse → EHR | EHR, RCS | `CoverageID`, status

events.name: eligibility.failed
events.description: Eligibility verification failed; coverage is inactive or termed.
events.descriptionZh: 资格核验失败；保险覆盖为非有效或已终止。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `EligibilityVerified` (or `EligibilityFailed`).

events.name: triage.completed
events.description: Triage is complete with an acuity level and triage timestamp recorded.
events.descriptionZh: 分诊已完成，记录了急性度等级与分诊时间戳。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `TriageCompleted`; conditionally `SepsisSuspected` when SIRS criteria fire.

events.name: sepsis.suspected
events.description: SIRS criteria fired during triage; the sepsis bundle clock starts at the triage timestamp.
events.descriptionZh: 分诊期间触发 SIRS 标准；脓毒症集束计时自分诊时间戳起算。

sources.snippet: conditionally `SepsisSuspected` when SIRS criteria fire.
A sepsis bundle must record a lactate result within 3 hours of the triage timestamp.

events.name: order.placed
events.description: One or more Orders have been placed referencing a catalog Procedure.
events.descriptionZh: 已下达一条或多条引用目录诊疗操作的医嘱。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `OrderPlaced`; conditionally `AuthorizationRequired` for designated Procedures.

events.name: authorization.required
events.description: A designated high-cost Procedure was ordered without an approved authorization, opening Process C.
events.descriptionZh: 下达了无已批准授权的指定高费用诊疗操作，开启流程 C。

sources.snippet: conditionally `AuthorizationRequired` for designated Procedures.
**Triggering event:** `AuthorizationRequired` (emitted in Step 4.4).

events.name: authorization.requested
events.description: A prior-authorization request (EDI 278) has been transmitted to the payer.
events.descriptionZh: 已向付款方发送事前授权请求（EDI 278）。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `AuthorizationRequested`.
`AuthorizationRequested` | 授权已申请 | EHR | Clearinghouse | `AuthID`, `ProcedureID`

events.name: authorization.approved
events.description: The payer approved the authorization; the Order is released for scheduling.
events.descriptionZh: 付款方批准了授权；医嘱获释放以供排程。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `AuthorizationApproved` (releases the Order for scheduling) or `AuthorizationDenied` (returns the Order to the clinician).
`AuthorizationApproved` | 授权已批准 | Clearinghouse → EHR | EHR, RCS | `AuthID`, approvalNumber, expirationDate

events.name: authorization.denied
events.description: The payer denied the authorization; the Order is returned to the clinician.
events.descriptionZh: 付款方拒绝了授权；医嘱退回临床医师。

sources.snippet: `AuthorizationDenied` (returns the Order to the clinician).

events.name: procedure.documented
events.description: A Procedure has been documented with start/stop times and linked to a supporting Diagnosis; opens charge capture.
events.descriptionZh: 诊疗操作已记录起止时间并关联支持性诊断；开启费用生成。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `ProcedureDocumented`.
`ProcedureDocumented` | 操作已记录 | Epic EHR | RCS | `ProcedureID`, `EncounterID`

events.name: encounter.discharged
events.description: The Encounter has been discharged; this trigger opens Process B coding.
events.descriptionZh: 就诊已出院；该触发开启流程 B 的编码工作。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `EncounterDischarged` — this is the trigger that opens Process B.

events.name: charge.captured
events.description: A Charge has been generated from a documented Procedure and mapped to an active CDM line.
events.descriptionZh: 已由已记录诊疗操作生成费用并映射到有效 CDM 行。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `ChargeCaptured`; conditionally `ChargeRouterError` when no CDM match exists.
`ChargeCaptured` | 费用已生成 | RCS | RCS, Clarity | `ChargeID`, `cdmCode`, amount

events.name: charge.router_error
events.description: Charge generation failed because no active CDM line matched the documented Procedure.
events.descriptionZh: 费用生成失败，因未找到与已记录诊疗操作匹配的有效 CDM 行。

sources.snippet: conditionally `ChargeRouterError` when no CDM match exists.

events.name: coding.completed
events.description: Final ICD-10/CPT codes were assigned and edits passed for the Encounter.
events.descriptionZh: 就诊已分配最终 ICD-10/CPT 编码且编辑检查通过。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `CodingCompleted`; conditionally `CodingEditFailed`.
`CodingCompleted` | 编码已完成 | Epic EHR / RCS | RCS | `EncounterID`, code set

events.name: coding.edit_failed
events.description: Coding failed an NCCI or medical-necessity edit and is routed for review.
events.descriptionZh: 编码未通过 NCCI 或医疗必要性编辑，路由复核。

sources.snippet: conditionally `CodingEditFailed`.

events.name: claim.assembled
events.description: A draft Claim was assembled and scrubbed; status is Ready or Held.
events.descriptionZh: 草稿理赔单已组装并清洗；状态为 Ready 或 Held。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `ClaimAssembled`; conditionally `ClaimScrubFailed` (routes to a billing edit work queue).

events.name: claim.scrub_failed
events.description: The Claim failed one or more scrubber edits and is routed to the billing edit work queue.
events.descriptionZh: 理赔单未通过一项或多项清洗编辑，路由至计费编辑工作队列。

sources.snippet: conditionally `ClaimScrubFailed` (routes to a billing edit work queue).

events.name: claim.submitted
events.description: A Ready Claim was submitted to the payer as an EDI 837 transaction.
events.descriptionZh: 处于 Ready 状态的理赔单已作为 EDI 837 交易提交给付款方。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `ClaimSubmitted`; the Clearinghouse returns a **999/277CA** acknowledgment that raises `ClaimAccepted` or `ClaimRejected`.
`ClaimSubmitted` | 理赔已提交 | RCS → Clearinghouse | Clearinghouse, payer | `ClaimID`, 837

events.name: claim.accepted
events.description: The Clearinghouse returned a 277CA acknowledgment accepting the Claim.
events.descriptionZh: 清算网关返回 277CA 确认，受理该理赔单。

sources.snippet: raises `ClaimAccepted` or `ClaimRejected`.
`ClaimAccepted` | 理赔已受理 | Clearinghouse → RCS | RCS | `ClaimID`, 277CA

events.name: claim.rejected
events.description: The Clearinghouse 999/277CA acknowledgment rejected the Claim before payer adjudication.
events.descriptionZh: 清算网关 999/277CA 确认在付款方裁定前退回了理赔单。

sources.snippet: raises `ClaimAccepted` or `ClaimRejected`.

events.name: remittance.received
events.description: A payer EDI 835 remittance file has landed for posting.
events.descriptionZh: 付款方 EDI 835 汇款文件已到达，待入账。

sources.snippet: **Triggering event:** `RemittanceReceived` (835 file lands).
Clearinghouse → RCS | EDI 835 | Remittance / payments / Denials | On payer file arrival

events.name: payment.posted
events.description: Payments and adjustments were posted at the Charge level from the 835.
events.descriptionZh: 已依据 835 在费用项层面入账付款与调整。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `PaymentPosted` and/or `ClaimDenied`.
`PaymentPosted` | 付款已入账 | RCS | RCS, Clarity | `ClaimID`, paid amount, 835

events.name: claim.denied
events.description: One or more lines were denied; a Denial was created carrying its CARC/RARC code.
events.descriptionZh: 一行或多行被拒；已创建携带 CARC/RARC 码的拒付记录。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `PaymentPosted` and/or `ClaimDenied`.
`ClaimDenied` | 理赔被拒 | RCS | RCS (Denials queue) | `DenialID`, `carcCode`

events.name: denial.assigned
events.description: A Denial was classified and routed to a Denials Analyst for rework or write-off.
events.descriptionZh: 拒付已分类并派单至拒付处理专员进行返工或核销。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `DenialAssigned`.

events.name: appeal.submitted
events.description: A corrected/replacement Claim or appeal packet was resubmitted, re-entering the remittance loop.
events.descriptionZh: 已重新提交更正/替换理赔单或申诉包，重回汇款循环。

sources.snippet: **Emitted event:** `AppealSubmitted` (re-enters the remittance loop at Step 6.5).

processes.description: Process A: the clinical pathway from registration through eligibility verification, triage, order placement, procedure documentation, and discharge.

triggers.description: A patient checks in (kiosk) or a scheduled-arrival signal fires.

sources.snippet: **流程 A — Admission to Discharge (入院到出院):** the clinical pathway from scheduling/registration through triage, ordering, treatment, documentation, and discharge.
| A — Admission to Discharge | 入院到出院 | `PatientArrived` | `EncounterDischarged` |

processes.description: Process C: obtaining payer approval for designated services via EDI 278, from request assembly through adjudication and posting.

triggers.description: A designated high-cost procedure is ordered without an approved authorization.

sources.snippet: **流程 C — Prior Authorization (事前授权):** obtaining payer approval for designated services.
| C — Prior Authorization | 事前授权 | `AuthorizationRequired` | `AuthorizationApproved` |

processes.description: Process B: the financial pathway from charge generation through coding, claim assembly, scrubbing, submission, and remittance posting.

actors.roleZh: 收入周期系统费用路由
收入周期系统理赔引擎

triggers.description: A documented procedure triggers charge capture.
Discharge opens the coding work queue.

sources.snippet: **流程 B — Charge Capture to Claim (计费到理赔提交):** the financial pathway from charge generation through coding, claim assembly, scrubbing, submission, and remittance.
| B — Charge Capture to Claim | 计费到理赔提交 | `ProcedureDocumented` | `PaymentPosted` |

processes.description: Process D: reworking and appealing rejected claims, from denial triage through appeal submission back into the remittance loop.

triggers.description: A claim line denial routes to the denials work queue.

sources.snippet: **流程 D — Denial Management & Appeal (拒付管理与申诉):** reworking and appealing rejected claims.
| D — Denial Management & Appeal | 拒付管理与申诉 | `ClaimDenied` | `AppealSubmitted` |

name.zh: 诊疗路径与收入周期（端到端）

processes.description: Inferred end-to-end orchestration chaining Processes A→C→B→D: from patient arrival and care delivery through prior authorization, charge-to-claim, and denial management to final payment.

actors.roleZh: 收入周期系统费用路由
收入周期系统理赔引擎

triggers.description: Patient arrival opens the end-to-end pathway.
